About.title: About
About.metaDescription: Chris Choi — Full Stack Developer turning UX into reality through code
About.aboutBlogContent: VXD Blog is a personal blog and tutoring platform integrated with Notion as a headless CMS. Optimized for SEO via SSR and enhanced by Gemini CLI for development productivity.
About.aboutAuthorContent: A Full Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience delivering business value using Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and AWS. I combine clean architecture with AI tools to create measurable business impact.
